title: Special Education: ARD Committee and Individualized Education Program
description: Conroe ISD's guidelines for special education meetings explain how the district works with parents to develop personalized learning plans for students with disabilities. The Admission, Review, and Dismissal (ARD) committee — which includes parents, teachers, and other school staff — meets to create and update each student's Individualized Education Program (IEP). These plans outline the specific supports, services, and goals designed to help each eligible student succeed in school.
